docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT COOK, MAURA M. COOK, WILLIAM T. AS TO RESPONDENT 3006-3006A SACRAMENTO ST HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION HEARING SET FOR SEP-11-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 3006-3006A SACRAMENTO ST HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COOK, MAURA M.
